name: ni-shiliu-neil-control
description: macOS music control skill for Claude Code

plugins.name: music-control
plugins.description: Autonomously control music playback on macOS (KuGou or Spotify). PROACTIVELY play music without being asked: detect the vibe of the conversation and pick a matching track. When a user is debugging, play something intense. Shipping a feature, play something upbeat. Deep focus work, play lofi. Also respond to explicit requests like play Jay Chou or play something relaxing. Always prefer taking action over asking.
